title: Aurora Polaris MVP Module Manifest
description: Minimal module manifest contract for MVP-relevant Aurora Polaris modules. Derived only from the approved Polaris control contract.

module_id.description: Stable technical module identifier, unique within the MVP context.

module_type.description: Open taxonomy. Source examples include Gateway, Orchestrator, Registry, Policy, Agent, Store, Router, Release Gate and Dashboard.

version.description: Versioned module state. SemVer is the stated target standard.

purpose.description: Concise purpose of the module in the MVP.

dependencies.description: Required internal modules, stores, policies or control surfaces. An empty list is allowed.

allowed_connectors.description: Allowed connectors. External connectors require explicit approval; use an empty array or conceptual_only when no operational connector is approved.

policy_profile.description: Assigned policy profile, or open if not yet specified.

trigger.description: Review trigger, for example confidence below threshold or policy violation.

threshold.description: Optional threshold value. The contract states Confidence < 0.83 as a HITL trigger; other threshold taxonomies remain open.

health_signals.description: Minimal operational and control signals visible through health or metrics surfaces.

required_fields.description: Required output fields for the module output.

audit_referenceable.description: Whether the output can be referenced by audit events.

fallback_action.description: Controlled fallback action from the approved control contract.
